tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text:
Across Britain, thousands of people give up their free time to help others. A 1.1. _________ is someone who works without being paid, simply because they care about their community. The amount of work these people do for free is almost 1.2. _________.

Last spring, a group of students in our town set up a 1.3. _________ campaign to clean a neglected park. The local council was so impressed by its 1.4. _________ that it promised more funding for similar schemes.

The 1.5. _________ of the project, a teacher named Mr Hill, said that even small acts can make a real 1.6. _________ to people's lives. "Our volunteers are wonderfully 1.7. _________ with their time," he added. "They are friendly, kind, and 1.8. _________ of what they have achieved together."

If you ever feel like helping out, remember that your local area almost certainly needs you. You do not need special skills or a great deal of time to begin. A single afternoon spent painting a fence, reading to elderly neighbours, or collecting litter can bring a whole street closer together. Communities are built slowly, by ordinary people who simply decide to care.
